comment: Project contains migrations directory with env.py and version files (e.g., 2105cf88eb29_init_db.py).
pyproject.toml contains [tool.ruff] configuration.
Project uses PostgreSQL (docker-compose.yaml: postgres:13.3, config.py: postgresql+asyncpg://...), not MySQL.
src/constants.py defines PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH = 8, used in src/services/password.py.
src/constants.py defines AUTH_TOKEN_TTL = 60 * 60 * 24 (24 hours).
src/app.py defines add_service_exceptions function with @application.exception_handler(ServiceException).
FastAPI title in src/app.py is 'Shop Placement Platform', not 'Pasta Bean Auth Service'.
src/app.py sets docs_url='/docs' only if app_config.is_debug is True, disabling it in production.
Dates in cache are stored as ISO format strings (src/cache/repositories/session.py), not Unix timestamps.
src/database/session.py sets autocommit=False in async_sessionmaker.
Database model 'sign_ins' in src/database/models.py has 'logout_at' column, allowing SQL queries for logout time.
Migration 1961c6ce7d4b_add_uniq_field.py creates unique constraint on 'users.email'.
Password data is stored in 'secure_user_infos' table, not in the 'users' table.
Password validation logic is in src/services/password.py, not in the Pydantic model (UserRegisterDTO).
Business logic is implemented in src/services/ (auth.py, password.py).
src/services/password.py uses os.urandom(32) for salt and hashlib.pbkdf2_hmac for hashing.
src/endpoints/routers/auth.py implements /auth/register, /auth/login, and /auth/logout endpoints.
No PUT /users/me endpoint is found. Available endpoints are GET /user/, POST /user/change_name, etc.
Integration tests exist in integration_tests/ and unit tests in tests/.
No email verification logic or external service call is present in the code to verify email validity.
docker-compose.test.yaml defines services for PostgreSQL and Redis, used by integration_tests/conftest.py.
